name: Darnell Arceneaux
role: Independent flat-bottom skiff operator and informal supply runner
publicFace: A lean, sun-burned man in his late twenties who has been moving between bridge camps and rooftop refuges for four days without sleeping more than two hours at a stretch — he looks like the water has been trying to keep him
privateGoal: To deliver the pharmaceutical crate and collect the fuel authorization chit Father Clement promised him — without which his skiff runs dry before he can reach his own family in Gentilly
fear: Running out of fuel on the open flood plane at night with a dead motor and no way to signal
knowledge: Father Clement Tureaud personally loaded the pharmaceutical crate onto his skiff at a staging point near the Claiborne Avenue overpass and told him the lot number was 'cleared through the diocese'

He has been running supply diversions for Father Clement for three days — he believed they were legitimate relief operations until this morning, when a woman at another bridge camp showed him a FEMA manifest that listed the same lot numbers as undelivered

There are three children on his skiff whose parents are in the bridge camp — Father Clement told him to deliver the crate first and the children second, which he has been trying to reconcile for two hours
voice: Exhausted and direct, with the flat affect of someone who has been making impossible decisions for so long that the emotional register has temporarily gone offline
trustLogic: Opens up when he senses that the other person is not going to use what he tells them to punish him — he is looking for someone to take the weight of what he knows off him
secrets: He has a fuel authorization chit from Father Clement in his shirt pocket that he has not disclosed to anyone — it is the only reason he has kept running the diversions
He knows the location of two other diverted pharmaceutical crates staged under the Claiborne Avenue overpass

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Deflects with operational logistics — talks about fuel, water depth, motor trouble — anything that keeps the conversation away from Father Clement
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Goes quiet and looks at his hands, then says he was just doing what he was told and he has people depending on him
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will not immediately disclose the fuel authorization chit — it is his survival margin
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If directly accused of criminal supply diversion without being offered any protection
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Pushes off from the piling and motors away at low speed, heading toward the Claiborne staging point
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Does not accelerate — he is too tired and the motor is nearly out of fuel anyway
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Discloses everything immediately, including the chit and the location of the other crates, in exchange for fuel and safe passage to Gentilly
